scripts.build: npm run sync:study && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.vercel-build: npm run db:migrate && npm run build
scripts.typecheck:api: tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck --target ES2020 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop api/auth.ts api/progress.ts api/chest.ts api/garden.ts api/upgrade.ts api/ranking.ts api/health.ts api/db-health.ts api/study.ts api/tasks.ts api/announcement.ts api/_auth.ts api/_errors.ts api/_migrations.ts api/_db.ts
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:scripts
